evals.prompt: Jag har kört landningssideanalys och RSA-skapare för SafeTeams kamerabevakningssida. Filerna ligger i mappen 'exempel'. Skapa nu en CSV-fil för Google Ads Editor. Budget 200 kr/dag, mål-CPA 150 kr, använd UTM-spårning (alternativ 1).
evals.expected_output: A CSV file with 1 campaign, 13 ad groups, ~114 keywords (all phrase match), 13 RSA ads, 35 negative keywords, location ID 2752 (Sweden), language sv, daily budget 200, Target CPA 150, bid strategy 'Maximize conversions', tracking template {lpurl} and UTM suffix. EU Political Ads set to 'No'. Campaign paused but ad groups, keywords, and ads enabled.

assertions.description: CSV bid strategy is Maximize conversions
assertions.check: The generated CSV file contains 'Maximize conversions' in the Bid strategy type column

assertions.description: CSV contains Target CPA value of 150
assertions.check: The generated CSV file contains '150' in the Target CPA column

assertions.description: CSV does not contain Maximize clicks
assertions.check: The generated CSV file does NOT contain 'Maximize clicks'

assertions.description: CSV has EU Political Ads column with value No
assertions.check: The CSV header contains 'EU Political Ads' and the campaign row has value 'No'
The campaign row has 'Paused' in the Campaign status column
Ad group rows have 'Enabled' in the Ad Group status column
Keyword rows have 'Enabled' in the Status column
RSA ad rows have 'Enabled' in the Status column

assertions.description: Negative keywords use straight ASCII quotes
assertions.check: Negative keyword rows in the CSV use straight ASCII double quotes (U+0022) around the keyword text, not Unicode curly quotes

assertions.description: Location targeting row has correct ID for Sweden
assertions.check: There is a location targeting row with Location ID '2752' (Sweden/National)

assertions.description: Nominal bid values present on ad group rows
assertions.check: Ad group rows contain '0.01' for Default max. CPC, Max. CPM, Target CPV, and Target CPM
RSA ad rows have Ad Name in the format '{AdGroupName}_RSA_1'

evals.prompt: Create a Google Ads Editor CSV from the RSA files in the 'exempel' folder. No budget, no tracking, just use the defaults. Target CPA should be 200.
evals.expected_output: CSV with empty budget, empty tracking fields, bid strategy 'Maximize conversions', Target CPA 200. EU Political Ads 'No'. Campaign paused, everything else enabled.

assertions.description: CSV bid strategy is Maximize conversions
assertions.check: The generated CSV file contains 'Maximize conversions' in the Bid strategy type column

assertions.description: CSV contains Target CPA value of 200
assertions.check: The generated CSV file contains '200' in the Target CPA column

assertions.description: CSV has EU Political Ads column with value No
assertions.check: The CSV header contains 'EU Political Ads' and the campaign row has value 'No'

assertions.description: Ad groups are Enabled while campaign is Paused
assertions.check: Campaign status is 'Paused' but Ad Group status is 'Enabled'

assertions.description: Budget field is empty when no budget specified
assertions.check: The Campaign daily budget column is empty (not '0' or any other value)

assertions.description: Tracking template is empty when defaults chosen
assertions.check: The Tracking template column is empty when user chose no tracking

evals.prompt: Skapa en importfil för Google Ads Editor baserat på analysfilerna i mappen 'exempel'. Jag vill ha budget 500 kr, mål-CPA 300 kr, och egen spårningsmall: tracking template '{lpurl}?source=gads' och suffix 'utm_source=google&utm_medium=cpc'.
evals.expected_output: CSV with custom tracking template and suffix. Budget 500. Target CPA 300. Bid strategy 'Maximize conversions'. EU Political Ads 'No'. Campaign paused, everything else enabled.

assertions.description: CSV bid strategy is Maximize conversions
assertions.check: The generated CSV file contains 'Maximize conversions'

assertions.description: CSV contains Target CPA value of 300
assertions.check: The generated CSV file contains '300' in the Target CPA column
The generated CSV file contains '500' in the Campaign daily budget column

assertions.description: CSV has EU Political Ads set to No
assertions.check: The CSV contains 'EU Political Ads' column with 'No' value
Ad groups, keywords, and ads have status 'Enabled' while campaign is 'Paused'
The Tracking template column contains the user-specified custom tracking template

assertions.description: Custom final URL suffix is present
assertions.check: The Final URL suffix column contains the user-specified custom suffix

evals.prompt: Jag har en RSA-fil med svenska nycklar (Kampanj, Annonsgrupp, Rubrik, Beskrivning, Sökord, etc.) i mappen 'test-swedish-keys'. Skapa en Google Ads Editor CSV. Mål-CPA 100 kr, ingen budget, standardspårning (alternativ 2).
evals.expected_output: The script should correctly parse Swedish keys (Kampanj, Annonsgrupp, Sökord, Platsinriktning, Slutlig webbadress, Visningsadress, Rubrik, Beskrivning) as backward compatibility. CSV should have correct campaign name, ad group name, keywords, headlines, descriptions, and all standard fields.

assertions.check: The CSV contains the campaign name from the 'Kampanj:' line in the RSA file
The CSV contains the ad group name from the 'Annonsgrupp:' line
RSA ad rows contain headline text from 'Rubrik N:' lines
RSA ad rows contain description text from 'Beskrivning N:' lines

assertions.description: Swedish position 'valfri position' maps to empty/unpinned
assertions.check: Headlines with 'valfri position' have empty position value in the CSV (unpinned)

evals.prompt: I have an RSA file with multiple ads separated by --- in the same file (3 ads for one ad group), plus keywords with mixed match types: some in quotes (phrase), some in brackets (exact), and some without (broad). The files are in the 'test-multi-ad' folder. Create a Google Ads Editor CSV. Target CPA 100, no budget.
evals.expected_output: CSV should contain 3 RSA ad rows for the same ad group (named _RSA_1, _RSA_2, _RSA_3), each with their own headlines/descriptions. Keywords should be correctly classified: quoted as Phrase, bracketed as Exact, bare as Broad. Each ad should inherit campaign/ad group/keywords from the header section.

assertions.description: Three RSA ads generated for the ad group
assertions.check: The CSV contains 3 RSA ad rows with Ad Names ending in _RSA_1, _RSA_2, and _RSA_3
Keywords wrapped in double quotes in the RSA file have Criterion Type 'Phrase' in the CSV
Keywords wrapped in square brackets in the RSA file have Criterion Type 'Exact' in the CSV
Keywords without any wrapping in the RSA file have Criterion Type 'Broad' in the CSV

assertions.description: Second and third ads can have different URLs/paths
assertions.check: If the second or third ad section specifies a different Final URL or display paths, those are reflected in the CSV

evals.prompt: RSA-filerna i mappen 'test-multi-location' har platsinriktning 'Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö'. Skapa CSV för Google Ads Editor. Mål-CPA 200 kr.
evals.expected_output: CSV should have three separate location targeting rows – one for Stockholm (1012728), one for Göteborg (1011919), and one for Malmö (1012046). Each row should only have Campaign and Location ID columns filled in.

assertions.check: The CSV contains 3 separate location targeting rows (one per city) rather than a single row with all locations
One location row has Location ID '1012728' (Stockholm)
One location row has Location ID '1011919' (Göteborg)
One location row has Location ID '1012046' (Malmö)

evals.prompt: Skapa en Google Ads Editor CSV från filerna i 'test-char-limits'. OBS: Några rubriker är för långa (över 30 tecken) och en beskrivning är över 90 tecken. Mål-CPA 100 kr.
evals.expected_output: The CSV should be generated despite character limit violations, but the skill should warn about each violation: which ad group, which headline/description, the actual length, and the max allowed. The CSV should still contain the too-long text (let the user fix it).

assertions.check: A CSV file is created even when character limits are exceeded
The output warns about each headline that exceeds 30 characters, listing the ad group, headline number, and actual length
The output warns about each description that exceeds 90 characters
The output warns about display paths that exceed 15 characters
